title: Rust: OSCORE replay window constant WINDOW_SIZE defined but not used consistently
description:
In rust/lichen-oscore/src/lib.rs, check_replay() uses WINDOW_SIZE constant (32) but this constant is not defined at module level - it's only a local const in the function. The constant should be promoted to module level for consistency and documentation.

Additionally, the replay_window field is a u32 bitfield, which can only track 32 sequence numbers. If WINDOW_SIZE is changed, the bitfield size must also change. This coupling is not documented or enforced.

Location: rust/lichen-oscore/src/lib.rs:403-427
Risk: Confusion if someone changes WINDOW_SIZE without understanding the u32 constraint.
Fix: Define WINDOW_SIZE at module level with a comment explaining the u32 coupling.
